headline: How The Vinci (ENXTPA:DG) Investment Story Is Shifting With Fresh Analyst Targets And Data
summary: Vinci's fair value estimate has been refreshed to about €142.24 from roughly €140.90, a modest uplift that keeps the price target firmly within its prior range. This adjustment ties in with recent analyst commentary, where several banks have raised targets while others, such as JPMorgan at €140 with an Underweight rating, remain cautious about further upside. As you read on, you will see how this mix of optimism and restraint shapes the evolving Vinci investment story and what it means for...

headline: Why Piper Sandler Sees Dollar General (DG)’s 2026 Growth Setup as Less Straightforward Than It Looks
summary: Dollar General Corporation (NYSE:DG) is one of the stocks most affected by inflation. headline: VINCI: Implementation of the share buyback programme
summary: Nanterre, 25th March 2026 Implementation of the share buyback programme As part of the implementation of its share buyback programme, VINCI signed a share purchase agreement with an investment services provider on 25th March 2026. According to the agreement, valid from March 26th until May 7th, 2026 at the latest, VINCI is mandating the investment services provider to purchase VINCI shares on its behalf within the limit of €250 million.
